title: Decide LiveView vs component for a page-level view
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/posts_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.PostsLive) as a LiveView (not a LiveComponent). It must own its own URL — use `use MyAppWeb, :live_view`. mount/3 returns {:ok, stream(socket, :posts, [])}. handle_params loads MyApp.Posts.list_posts into the stream. The render/1 uses @streams.posts. A page-level view is a LiveView, not a LiveComponent.
tier_rationale: Decide LiveView vs LiveComponent based on page-level scope. Canonical rule.
research_citation: georgeguimaraes/claude-code-elixir: 'LiveViews: Full page, owns URL, top-level state'
